text.title: Gcp Iam Design Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the gcp-iam-design methodology end-to-end. Each step lists explicit input → action → output and (optionally) a decision-gate.

step.name: tier-roles
step.action: Replace basic roles with predefined; introduce conditions on sensitive bindings.

step.name: kill-sa-keys
step.action: Migrate CI/CD to Workload Identity Federation; rotate / delete keys.

step.name: consolidate-scope
step.action: Move cross-cutting bindings to folder level; remove project-level duplicates.
